title: Siblings Arguing and Making Up 兄弟姐妹吵架和好
scene: Tom和Sister因为玩具吵架后又和好。

lines.en: Give me back my toy! You always take my things!
lines.zh: 把我的玩具还给我！你总是拿我的东西！

lines.en: I was just playing with it. You never let me play!
lines.zh: 我只是玩一下。你从来不让我玩！
因为你什么东西都会弄坏！

lines.en: I do not! You are so mean to me!
lines.zh: 我才不会！你对我太刻薄了！

lines.en: I am sorry I yelled at you.
lines.zh: 对不起我对你大喊大叫了。

lines.en: I am sorry too. I should have asked first.
lines.zh: 我也对不起。我应该先问你。

lines.en: Do you want to play together?
Yes. Can we build a tower with the blocks?
lines.zh: 想。我们用积木搭一座塔好不好？

lines.en: Good idea. Let me help you.
You are the best brother in the world!
lines.zh: 你是世界上最好的哥哥！
